content.en:
Time passed, and nearly a hundred eternal years had passed, and Ye Tian's cultivation time in the Black Delirium River had arrived.

In fact, at this point in time, the effect of practicing in the Black Delirium River has also decreased a lot, which is also a factor in the reason for the limitation.

Otherwise, it would be abnormal to maintain this effect all the time.

At this time, Ye Tian ranked eighty-sixth on the Blood Battle List, which was also a good ranking.

"It's time to go to the next treasure land!"

Ye Tian came out of the Black Delirium River.

After all, the Land of Blood Battle is a place where many resources and cultivation treasures are mastered, which makes many half-step perfect controllers so eager to enter here.

Next, the place Ye Tian is going to is the Daoyun Sea in Zhendao Mountain.

The Daoyun Sea is a place that assists in the changes of the path of enlightenment, but it is also a very important place.

If a half-step perfect master wants to become a perfect master, in addition to raising the body and will of control to the perfection level, he must also perfect his own Dao to the level of the perfect path.

Before, Ye Tian didn't know what the way of perfection was, but now he knew.

There are 3.3 billion kinds of changes, once the changes of one's own Dao are mastered to such an extent, then one's own Dao can be transformed into a perfect path, forming a huge transformation, far surpassing the half-step perfect path.

Three hundred and thirty billion changes, how difficult it is, many half-step perfect masters can master any of the three thousand paths to one billion kinds, let alone three billion changes, and they are the ones who have created themselves.

Therefore, this difficulty is too great, many half-step perfect controllers have reached the perfect level in terms of both body and will, and have also created many top perfect control skills, and their strength has reached the extreme of the peak half-step perfect controller, but due to their own way, they still can't impact the realm of perfect controllers.

And the Dao Yun Sea is undoubtedly an incomparably amazing place, which can allow a half-step perfect master to quickly comprehend the changes of the Dao.

Of course, the average half-step perfect master will not comprehend his own path, but will consult other paths, and only after attaining a certain level of enlightenment in other paths will he be able to master the changes of his own path.

However, before mastering the changes of many Daos, from one billion changes to three or three billion changes, the increase in strength will not be too large.

As a result, many half-step perfect masters were almost the last to enter the Dao Yun Sea to cultivate.

However, Ye Tian is difficult now, he has the hope of mastering several Dao to the level of three billion three billion changes, once he masters one Dao of three billion changes, then his own change mark will transform into a perfect mark.

The strength of the Perfect Seal Amplification is still very good, so it is worth him to come here to participate in the changes of the Enlightenment Dao.

......

Daoyun Sea.

Ye Tian came here, there was still the pressure of Zhendao Mountain here, and the pressure was even heavier, and ordinary half-step perfect controllers could not come to this position.

Because Dao Yunhai's location in Zhendao Mountain is deeper than that of the Blood War Capital.

However, Ye Tian's strength had reached the level of a top half-step perfect controller, so it was not difficult to come here, it was quite easy.

Dao Yunhai is very small, and Ye Tian's perception can be seen at a glance.

Now.

There are about thirty half-step perfect masters who have come here to participate in the enlightenment and cultivation, and each of them has integrated into the Dao Yun Sea, condensing the realm with their own strength, and swearing their own cultivation range.

Ye Tian chose an empty area, integrated into the Dao Yun Sea, and began to practice and comprehend.

"The sea water of the Dao Yun Sea actually contains infinite Dao changes, no wonder this place can allow half-step perfect controllers to participate in the changes of the Dao of Enlightenment!" Ye Tian was surprised.

And at this time, Ye Tiandao's affinity ability was too helpful.

With a comprehension speed far beyond that of other half-step perfect controllers, he sensed the changes in the Dao here.

"It's worthy of Dao Yunhai, the effect is so good!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

He had never seen such a treasure land, and it was too helpful for the improvement of Dao's perception.

I have to say, where is there such a place in the Origin Realm Sea, but there is such a place in the Ruins of Eternity, and if you can cultivate in such a place, even if you are a fool, the ascension of the change of the Dao will not be slow!

"Let's first comprehend the changes in the way of space, after all, the way of time and space is the two most powerful ways, and the creation and perfection of many perfect control techniques are also inseparable from the way of time and space. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to comprehend the changes in the Dao of Space with all his might.

Originally, he had reached a billion changes in the Dao of Space, but after reaching a billion, his progress was already very slow.

And at this moment, Ye Tian easily mastered one Dao change after another.

After a period of time, Ye Tian's Dao changes had mastered 1.1 billion Dao changes.

One eternal year after another passed, and before he knew it, Ye Tian had practiced here for a thousand eternal years.

With his current rank, he can comprehend five thousand eternal years here.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian's spatial Dao changes had mastered thirty-three billion kinds.

And at this moment, Ye Tian's spatial Dao change mark began to undergo a drastic transformation.

Airplanes!!!

The imprint is metamorphosing, and it is transforming into a perfect imprint.

The thirty-three billion changes of the Dao of Space circulated in the Perfect Imprint, and in a short time, the Perfect Imprint was completely transformed.

Whoa!!

The power of the will is perceived.

Obviously, it was the other half-step perfect controllers who sensed Ye Tian's perfect imprint.

"Who is this, who has actually mastered the Spatial Perfection Mark!"

"It's Ye Tian of the Wudao Tower, not long after he came to the Wudao Tower, and he is currently ...... What, he has already reached the twenty-third place in the blood battle list! The last time I saw it, he was still in the fifties!"

"Ye Tian's cultivation speed is too fast, according to his progress speed, he will definitely become the first place on the blood battle list in the future!"

"It's really demonic, not counting other aspects, it can be described as lucky, and he has obtained a lot of resources, but he can master the perfect imprint of space, this is not a problem of resources, but a problem of comprehension talent. I have to say that Ye Tian is indeed very demonic, far beyond my demonic level!"

"Continue to practice, no matter how evil people are, that's also people, I'll still practice hard, and strive to hit the top ten of the blood battle list before the arrival of the 100,000 eternal years!"

Subsequently.

A half-step perfect master retracted his will and continued to practice diligently.

And at this moment, Ye Tian was also continuing to cultivate, after all, he had only mastered a perfect mark, and he wanted to master more perfect marks.

In addition, in this thousand eternal years, he has perfected two perfect control skills to the level of top perfect control skills, and these two top perfect control skills are divided into Heaven Devouring Battle Body and Mist Body.

That's why he's progressing so fast.

"Soon, with a few more Eternal Years to go, I can reach the top ten of the Blood Battle List!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

On this day, when Ye Tian was practicing, he suddenly found that his ranking had improved by six places in a short period of time.

In this short period of time, he has not made much progress, why did he suddenly advance six places.

After taking a closer look, he realized that there were six half-step perfect controllers who had exceeded the time of 100,000 eternal years, so they left the Blood War Capital, and were naturally kicked out of the Blood Battle List.

At this time, Ye Tian's ranking came to the seventeenth place.
